critic_findings.message: import os appears inline at lines 50, 145, and 167. The _run_script helper imports os locally; the two --read mode tests (lines 137 and 162) bypass _run_script entirely and duplicate the subprocess.run setup verbatim. Move os to the top-level imports and extend _run_script to accept an optional args list so --read mode tests can call _run_script(tmp_path, settings_path=settings, extra_env={}, args=['--read']).

Top-level claim_emoji: 'raising_hand' (line 60) coexists with coordination.ticket_claim_emoji: 'eyes' (line 76). The rename fixed the coordination sub-key but left the old top-level key in place. If claim_emoji is the engineer-claiming emoji and ticket_claim_emoji is the multi-instance ticket-reservation emoji, both keys must be retained and their distinct purposes must be documented with inline comments. If they are the same concept, remove the old top-level key and update SKILL.md line 450 to read from coordination.ticket_claim_emoji.
